option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
--- title: Welcome to Starlight description: Get started building your docs site with Starlight. ---
Use the left sidebar to browse all docs.
I updated the navigation to auto-link every folder inside `src/content/docs`.
You can add new `.md` or `.mdx` pages under any folder and they will appear in the sidebar automatically.

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
--- title: Docs Home description: Browse the latest notes and documentation. ---
import RecentPosts from '../../components/RecentPosts.astro';
## Documentation
- [Algorithms](/algorithms/) - [Architecture](/architecture/) - [Databases](/databases/) - [Design Patterns](/design-patterns/)
<RecentPosts limit={15} title="Recent Posts" />
